title: Not Enough Optimizations Lite
description: General and tech optimizations for lower end computers
body:
Not Enough Optimizations Lite is a fork of my optimization pack, Not Enough Optimizations (NEOM). 

This packs goal is to keep most of the speed of NEOM while loading faster on slower computers. while there are almost no changes to how Minecraft can be played, it contains many improvements to the technical aspects of Minecraft, making it great for people who play on a budget but also want to make farms and machines. it is recommended to play singleplayer as are no network or server optomizations in the new packs.

Base NEOM can be [found here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/neom)

To users, this modpack is made for singleplayer worlds. NEOM is better for servers as it has networking optimizations. To modpack creators, I recommend you use base NEOM for your modpacks, not NEOM Lite
